specific_mechanism: Twin domains in non-centrosymmetric crystals share a mirror-symmetric boundary; domain-wall energy scales with surface tension and elastic mismatch
llm_application: LLM representation-space twin domains: in models trained with mirror-data-augmentation, latent-space partitions into mirror-related twin domains; domain-wall energy quantifies prefer-one-mode bias.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes crystallography topological-defect mapping as proposed.
